title: peucedanum armeniacum
intro: Peucedanum armeniacum, also known as Armenian dragon or Armenian angelica, is a perennial plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). Its medicinal properties are attributed to its essential oil, which contains compounds like limonene and β-pinene, and its root, which has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Peucedanum armeniacum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Peucedanum armeniacum are typically made from its roots and leaves, which can be dried, powdered, or infused in teas to harness its medicinal properties.
